case_title: IN RE: KIM UNTIEDT CONANT AND KAREN U. HILLMAN, AS et al

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY RESPONDENT ELISEO TWO, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JAZO GROUP LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-15-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, RESPONDENT ELISEO TWO, LLC AND JAZO GROUP LLC'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE TO MARIN COUNTY IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 3, 2014 PER STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, NTC OF MTN AND MTN TO TRANSFER VENURE TO MARIN COUNTY CONTINUED FROM FEB-03-2014 TO UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTIONS AT FEB-19-2014, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 501 PER STIPULATION AND ORDER. (D501)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, RESPONDENT ELISEO TWO, LLC AND JAZO GROUP LLC'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE TO MARIN COUNTY IS GRANTED. RESPONDENT'S REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS IS DENIED. PETITIONERS DO NOT DISPUTE THAT THE RESPONDENTS' PRINCIPAL PLACES OF BUSINESS ARE LOCATED IN MARIN COUNTY. THE RESPONDENTS DID NOT SHOW THAT THEY ATTEMPTED TO STIPULATE TO CHANGE OF VENUE AND WERE REJECTED, OR THAT THE PETITIONERS SELECTED THE PRESENT VENUE IN BAD FAITH. VENUE IS NOT PROPER IN SAN FRANCISCO. THE REQUEST FOR FEES IS DENIED. (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 396B(B. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: B.PAREDES, NOT REPORTED (D501)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Transfer Venure To Marin County
Off Calendar Feb-19-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: RESPONDENT ELISEO TWO, LLC and JAZO GROUP LLC's Motion To Transfer Venue To Marin County is GRANTED. Respondent's request for attorney fees and costs is DENIED. Petitioners do not dispute that the Respondents' principal places of business are located in Marin County. The Respondents did not show that they attempted to stipulate to change of venue and were rejected, or that the Petitioners selected the present venue in bad faith. Venue is not proper in San Francisco. The request for fees is denied. (Code of Civ. Proc., 396b(b). Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Marla J. Miller, Clerk: B.Paredes, Not reported (D501)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Transfer Venure To Marin County

MINI MINUTES: No Appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: RESPONDENT ELISEO TWO, LLC and JAZO GROUP LLC's Motion To Transfer Venue To Marin County is Continued to February 3, 2014 per stipulation of the parties. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)
